element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player enters mansion freely before first encounter
Player is attacked immediately upon reaching attic; establishes threat presence
Basic defense against initial supernatural enemies
Found throughout mansion; enhances combat options against creatures
Player must manage limited carrying capacity; requires strategic item selection
Some enemies cannot be killed; must solve specific puzzles instead
Environmental storytelling; provides context for game's lore and objectives
Opening, closing doors; pushing objects to progress
Some enemies cannot be killed and must be avoided; requires stealth/escape
Linear progression through dark rituals' site; final challenge area

typical_tension_triggers: Descending deeper into mansion toward caverns
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension with exploration-based relief; alternates between safe investigation phases and dangerous supernatural encounters; buildup intensifies toward cavern descent

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Partially non-linear level design with restricted initial access; player must complete puzzles to unlock lower floors and caverns
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Documents and texts scattered throughout environment reveal hidden lore and backstory; environmental narrative embedded in findable objects

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate - player restricted to attic and third floor in linear order; introduction to basic combat and exploration with initial supernatural encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate-to-challenging - first and second floors unlock with non-linear exploration options; inventory management becomes critical; mix of combat and puzzle encounters
difficulty_curve.late_game: Challenging - caverns beneath mansion present linear, escalating puzzles; completely linear progression with mandatory obstacle overcoming; encounter with final supernatural threat (Pregzt's spirit)
notable_spikes: First enemy encounter in attic (establishes danger)
Third floor puzzle completion (gate to broader exploration)
Cavern descent (transition to linear endgame with mandatory challenges)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game uses puzzle completion as key to unlock new areas; attic and third floor are linear gatekeepers; first/second floors allow exploration freedom; caverns return to enforced linearity
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Third floor to first/second floor transition

notable_level_patterns.description: Narrative delivered through scattered documents and texts; player must actively search rooms to uncover Ezechiel Pregzt's history, dark rituals, and connection to Jeremy Hartwood's suicide
Creatures respond to different strategies: some killed with weapons/fists, some require puzzle solutions, some demand evasion; forces player to adapt approach per encounter type

Player progression moves downward through structure (attic → upper floors → caverns); spatial descent mirrors narrative descent into occult history; final confrontation with Pregzt's spirit in deepest caverns
